description: ACS 5-year (acs5) variable metadata for MarketMind Census pulls. Use this to verify Census documentation before any live API call.

block_group.label: Census block group FIPS code (state+county+tract+block group)

median_household_income.label: Median household income in the past 12 months (inflation-adjusted dollars)

college_student_population_pct.label: Share of total population enrolled in college or graduate/professional school (male + female)
college_student_population_pct.composition_note: Computed as (B14001_008E + B14001_009E) / B01003_001E using only male enrollment codes available at block-group geography in ACS 2022 (female enrollment detail codes used previously are not valid at block group). Guard divide-by-zero when population is 0. Treat suppressed values as null.

rent_to_income_ratio.label: Median gross rent as a percentage of household income
